name: team-mixed-model-test
description: Two teammate slots in one team, each pinned to a different model. Validates that the per-step `model` field is honored independently per slot — one Agent call carries `model: "haiku"`, the other carries `model: "sonnet"`.

steps.command: mkdir -p .wheel/outputs/team-mixed && echo 'Mixed-model test started' > .wheel/outputs/team-mixed/setup.txt && echo 'Setup complete'

echo '## Mixed-Model Team Test Results' && echo '' && echo 'Summary:' && cat .wheel/outputs/team-mixed/summary.json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.completed_count, .failed_count' && echo '' && echo 'Collected outputs:' && find .wheel/outputs/team-mixed/results/ -type f 2>/dev/null | sort
